mapper.select: SELECT a.appeal_id, a.qualification_id, a.tenant_id, a.appeal_reason, a.appeal_attachments, a.appeal_time, a.handle_result, a.handle_opinion, a.handle_by, a.handle_time, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.del_flag, u.nickname, u.real_name, u.phone, u.contact_phone, u.id_card, COALESCE(u.education, '无') as current_education, a.appeal_reason as new_education FROM hz_qualification_appeal a LEFT JOIN hz_user u ON a.tenant_id = u.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT a.appeal_id, a.qualification_id, a.tenant_id, a.appeal_reason, a.appeal_attachments, a.appeal_time, a.handle_result, a.handle_opinion, a.handle_by, a.handle_time, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.del_flag, u.nickname, u.real_name, u.phone, u.contact_phone, u.id_card, COALESCE(u.education, '无') as current_education, a.appeal_reason as new_education, su.nick_name as handler_name FROM hz_qualification_appeal a LEFT JOIN hz_user u ON a.tenant_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON a.handle_by = su.user_id WHERE a.appeal_id = #{appealId} AND a.del_flag = '0'

SELECT a.appeal_id, a.qualification_id, a.tenant_id, a.appeal_reason, a.appeal_attachments, a.appeal_time, a.handle_result, a.handle_opinion, a.handle_by, a.handle_time, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.del_flag, u.nickname, u.real_name, u.phone, u.contact_phone, u.id_card, COALESCE(u.education, '无') as current_education, a.appeal_reason as new_education FROM hz_qualification_appeal a LEFT JOIN hz_user u ON a.tenant_id = u.user_id WHERE a.tenant_id = #{userId} AND a.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
